ic_url.description: URL of a custom icon image to load for the close button. When provided, the image is loaded and displayed on the close button view, replacing the default close icon.

show.description: Controls whether the close button is visible on the subscription screen. When true, the close button is displayed; when false, it is hidden.

id.description: Unique identifier for this close button configuration, used to match the component within the Optimus screen's list of components.

top_margin.description: Top margin of the close button in density-independent pixels (dp). The value is converted to pixels at runtime and applied as the top margin of the close button view's layout parameters.

alignment.description: Horizontal alignment of the close button on the subscription screen. Deserialized as "left" for LEFT and "right" for CENTER. When "left", the button is constrained to the start (left) edge; when "right", it is constrained to the end (right) edge. Also determines whether side_margin is applied as marginStart (left) or marginEnd (right).

side_margin.description: Side margin of the close button in density-independent pixels (dp). Applied as marginStart when alignment is left, or as marginEnd when alignment is right. The value is converted to pixels at runtime.
